overview.description: The iShares Core 30/70 Conservative Allocation ETF (AOK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Target Risk Conservative index. The fund tracks a proprietary index that provides significant exposure to fixed income securities and a small portion to equities with a goal of seeking current income while preserving capital. AOK was launched on Nov 4, 2008 and is issued by BlackRock.
